message:
test(engine): update FRX online regret change-point demotion controller tests

Updates test expectations and adds new test scenarios for the
demotion controller gate, covering:
- Adjusted thresholds for regret change-point detection
- New edge case: demotion at exactly the boundary regret value
- Verification that demoted controllers cannot be re-promoted
  without explicit reset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
